title: Journey Into The Light
description: Journey Into The Light (or "Journey" for short), formally known as Essence of the Gods, is a large exploration mod that not only expands the vanilla content added - but also adds 8 new dimensions, over one hundred mobs, strong weapons and armor, and more
body:
HEY YOU! READ ME!

THIS MOD NEEDS [Gekolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) AND [Curios](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)

[Patchouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli), [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi), [JER](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-enough-resources-jer) and [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) are **Highly Reccomended**


If you have any questions, please visit our Discord server: [Click Me](https://discord.gg/WhXvz5b)


![logo](https://i.imgur.com/kQWObeO.jpg)

Experience an immersive RPG-style adventure mod that doesn't stray too far from Vanilla's roots.


Journey Into The Light (or "Journey" for short), formally known as Essence of the Gods, is a large exploration mod that not only expands the vanilla content added - but also adds 8 new dimensions, over one hundred mobs, strong weapons and armor, and much more.


We recommend to install JER (Just Enough Resources) to assist you along the way 

Journey Into the Light, formally Essence of the Gods, was created by AllShamNoWow101(The_SlayerMC)



## Development Team:

Yes, you can use this mod in a modpack or review it, as long as you give credit where its due. No sane person would say no to that.
